name: standards-refresh.sh crawl stops fetching when the entry's max_pages budget is reached and records the overflow in the manifest
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-r35-$$; mkdir -p $OUT/docs $OUT/out && cat > $OUT/docs/index.html <<'HTML'

Doc

Budget the crawl surface

Crawl budgets must bound how many pages a refresh may fetch.

p1 p2 p3 HTML for i in 1 2 3; do printf '

P%s

Numbered guidance rule %s

Every page in this fixture carries one distinct guidance statement.

' $i $i > $OUT/docs/p$i.html; done cat > $OUT/reg.yaml <e.err; M=$(ls "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/.claude-tdd-pro/crawls/"r35-src-*.jsonl | head -1); grep -q 'pages_fetched=2' e.err && grep -q 'max-pages' "$M" && echo max-pages-budget-honored 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
